stemHtml: Which of the following statements best describes the FANS concept?

options.a: An EASA concept for European aircraft certified to comply with radio frequency distribution.
options.b: An ICAO concept is used in FANS airspace over the oceans to allow smoother traffic flows.
options.c: A concept used by air traffic controllers to prioritise VHF communication over HF communication.
options.d: A system used to enhance HF communication range and quality in FANS airspace.
